title: Aurora, 33527, Palm Pals Leno Lion, 5In, Soft Toy, Golden Brown
features: Let's meet the Palm Pals Leno Lion Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable golden-brown lion plush is filled with beans. It fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling. A wonderful gift for any occasion!

The Leno Lion is part of the Palm Pals Zoo collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Critters, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Leno Lion measures 13cm. Brave and strong, Leno is the leader! Truly a king of the jungle, Leno will take charge to conquer the days ahead. This lionhearted Leno will surely win everyone's hearts!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Say Hello to the Palm Pals Leno Lion Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable golden-brown lion plush is filled with beans. It fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling, and it makes a wonderful gift for any occasion! Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Leno Lion measures 13cm. Brave and strong, Leno is the leader! Truly a king of the jungle, Leno will take charge to conquer the days ahead. This lionhearted Leno will surely win everyone's hearts! The Leno Lion is part of the Palm Pals Zoo collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Critters, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
